title: Continue a half-complete cursor pagination feature

events.text: Add cursor pagination without breaking the existing single-page list method. Do not prefetch pages.
The response parser now returns items plus nextCursor, and list() still returns only the first page.
An eager collectAll() helper was drafted and deleted because it prefetched every page.
Expose an async iterator named pages(); each next() should fetch exactly one page.
src/client.ts and src/response.ts are modified; no pages() implementation or iterator test exists.

criticalConstraints.text: Keep the existing single-page list method compatible.
Do not prefetch pages; one iterator step fetches one page.

objectiveAndState.text: Add cursor pagination; response parsing is done and the async iterator is missing.

decisionsAndFailedAttempts.text: Eager collectAll was deleted because it violated the no-prefetch constraint.
The new interface is an async iterator named pages().

completedAndPending.text: Cursor parsing and list compatibility pass; pages() and its tests remain pending.

workspaceEvidence.text: client.ts and response.ts are modified; pages.test.ts is unchanged.

nextAction.text: Write the one-page-per-next iterator test, then implement pages().
